summary: Add `checkpoints list` command that lists Artistly's checkpoint (model) catalog from POST /api/checkpoints.
reason: generate/batch/preset accept --checkpoint-id (integer) but the CLI had no way to discover valid ids; users had to guess. The /api/checkpoints endpoint (found via a HAR capture of app.artistly.ai) returns the id->name/slug/trigger_words mapping. Distinct from `styles list` (illustrator styles driving --style).
validated_outcome: Built and live-tested: `checkpoints list` returns the full catalog (32 Photorealistic, 34 Comic, 39 Anime, ...); `checkpoints list --match comic --json` returns the single Comic entry. go build ./... and go vet ./... pass.
